    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="en" data-theme="dark">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Harish S — Developer & AI Enthusiast</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Harish S, known as Harish HAXR — Computer Engineering Student, Developer, AI Enthusiast building purposeful technology through creativity and innovation.">
    <meta name="keywords" content="Harish S, Harish HAXR, Developer, AI, Portfolio, Computer Engineering">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;0,700;1,300;1,400&family=DM+Mono:wght@300;400;500&family=Outfit:wght@200;300;400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
    :root {
    --gold: #D4AF37;
    --gold-light: #E8CC6A;
    --gold-dim: rgba(212,175,55,0.15);
    --gold-glow: rgba(212,175,55,0.3);
    --bg: #0A0A0A;
    --bg2: #111111;
    --bg3: #181818;
    --glass: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
    --glass-border: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    --text: #F5F5F0;
    --text-muted: rgba(245,245,240,0.5);
    --text-dim: rgba(245,245,240,0.3);
    --radius: 16px;
    --shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
    }
    [data-theme="light"] {
    --bg: #FAFAFA;
    --bg2: #F0F0EE;
    --bg3: #E8E8E5;
    --glass: rgba(0,0,0,0.03);
    --glass-border: rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
    --text: #1A1A1A;
    --text-muted: rgba(26,26,26,0.55);
    --text-dim: rgba(26,26,26,0.3);
    --shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    }
    *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
    html{scroll-behavior:smooth;font-size:16px}
    body{
    background:var(--bg);
    color:var(--text);
    font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif;
    font-weight:300;
    line-height:1.7;
    overflow-x:hidden;
    cursor:none;
    }
    /* CUSTOM CURSOR */
    #cursor{position:fixed;width:10px;height:10px;background:var(--gold);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:99999;transition:transform 0.1s ease;mix-blend-mode:difference}
    #cursor-ring{position:fixed;width:36px;height:36px;border:1px solid var(--gold);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:99998;transition:transform 0.15s ease,width 0.2s,height 0.2s,opacity 0.2s;transform:translate(-50%,-50%)}
    body:hover #cursor-ring{opacity:1}
    /* SCROLL PROGRESS */
    #progress{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),var(--gold-light));z-index:10000;transition:width 0.1s}
    /* LOADING SCREEN */
    #loader{
    position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--bg);z-index:99997;
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:24px;
    transition:opacity 0.8s ease,visibility 0.8s ease;
    }
    #loader.hide{opacity:0;visibility:hidden}
    .loader-name{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,6vw,4rem);font-weight:300;letter-spacing:0.3em;color:var(--text-dim);overflow:hidden}
    .loader-name span{display:inline-block;animation:loaderReveal 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) forwards;opacity:0;transform:translateY(100%)}
    @keyframes loaderReveal{to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
    .loader-bar{width:200px;height:1px;background:var(--glass-border);overflow:hidden}
    .loader-fill{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);animation:loaderFill 1.8s ease forwards}
    @keyframes loaderFill{from{transform:translateX(-100%)}to{transform:translateX(100%)}}
    .loader-sub{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.25em;color:var(--text-dim);text-transform:uppercase}
    /* NAV */
    nav{
    position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:1000;
    padding:0 5%;height:70px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
    transition:background 0.4s,backdrop-filter 0.4s,border-color 0.4s;
    }
    nav.scrolled{
    background:rgba(10,10,10,0.8);
    backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    }
    [data-theme="light"] nav.scrolled{background:rgba(250,250,250,0.85)}
    .nav-logo{
    font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
    font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:600;
    letter-spacing:0.1em;
    color:var(--gold);
    text-decoration:none;
    }
    .nav-logo span{color:var(--text);font-weight:300}
    .nav-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:2rem;list-style:none}
    .nav-links a{
    font-size:0.78rem;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--text-muted);text-decoration:none;
    transition:color 0.3s;font-weight:400;
    }
    .nav-links a:hover{color:var(--gold)}
    .nav-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem}
    .theme-toggle{
    width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    cursor:none;transition:all 0.3s;
    font-size:1rem;
    }
    .theme-toggle:hover{border-color:var(--gold);background:var(--gold-dim)}
    .nav-cta{
    padding:8px 22px;border-radius:100px;
    background:var(--gold);color:#0A0A0A;
    font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
    text-decoration:none;transition:all 0.3s;
    font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif;
    }
    .nav-cta:hover{background:var(--gold-light);transform:translateY(-1px)}
    .hamburger{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;cursor:none;padding:4px}
    .hamburger span{width:24px;height:1.5px;background:var(--text);transition:all 0.3s;display:block}
    /* MOBILE NAV */
    .mobile-nav{
    position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:999;
    background:var(--bg);
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:2rem;
    transform:translateX(100%);transition:transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1);
    }
    .mobile-nav.open{transform:translateX(0)}
    .mobile-nav a{
    font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
    font-size:2.5rem;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:0.1em;
    color:var(--text-muted);text-decoration:none;transition:color 0.3s;
    }
    .mobile-nav a:hover{color:var(--gold)}
    /* SECTIONS */
    section{padding:120px 5%;position:relative}
    .section-label{
    font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;
    font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.3em;text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:16px;display:block;
    }
    .section-title{
    font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
    font-size:clamp(2.5rem,5vw,4rem);font-weight:300;
    line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:1.5rem;
    }
    .section-title em{font-style:italic;color:var(--gold)}
    /* REVEAL ANIMATION */
    .reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(40px);transition:opacity 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1),transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)}
    .reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
    .reveal-delay-1{transition-delay:0.1s}
    .reveal-delay-2{transition-delay:0.2s}
    .reveal-delay-3{transition-delay:0.3s}
    .reveal-delay-4{transition-delay:0.4s}
    /* GLASS CARD */
    .glass-card{
    background:var(--glass);
    border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    border-radius:var(--radius);
    backdrop-filter:blur(12px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px);
    transition:all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1);
    }
    .glass-card:hover{
    border-color:rgba(212,175,55,0.3);
    transform:translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.4),0 0 40px var(--gold-dim);
    }
    /* ====== HERO ====== */
    #home{
    min-height:100vh;
    padding:0 5%;
    display:flex;align-items:center;
    position:relative;overflow:hidden;
    }
    .hero-bg{
    position:absolute;inset:0;
    background:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 60% 40%, rgba(212,175,55,0.06) 0%, transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 40% at 20% 70%, rgba(212,175,55,0.04) 0%, transparent 50%);
    }
    .hero-grid-overlay{
    position:absolute;inset:0;
    background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 1px,transparent 1px);
    background-size:60px 60px;
    mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 80% at 50% 50%,black 0%,transparent 80%);
    }
    .hero-content{position:relative;z-index:2;max-width:800px}
    .hero-badge{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
    padding:8px 16px;border-radius:100px;
    background:var(--gold-dim);border:1px solid rgba(212,175,55,0.2);
    font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;
    text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:2rem;
    }
    .hero-badge::before{content:'';width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gold);animation:pulse 2s infinite}
    @keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:0.5;transform:scale(0.8)}}
    .hero-name{
    font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
    font-size:clamp(4rem,10vw,9rem);
    font-weight:700;line-height:0.9;
    letter-spacing:-0.02em;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--text) 0%,var(--gold-light) 50%,var(--text) 100%);
    -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;
    margin-bottom:0.3rem;
    }
    .hero-handle{
    font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;
    font-size:clamp(0.8rem,2vw,1rem);
    letter-spacing:0.2em;color:var(--gold);
    margin-bottom:1.5rem;display:block;
    }
    .hero-headline{
    font-size:clamp(1rem,2vw,1.3rem);
    font-weight:300;color:var(--text-muted);
    margin-bottom:1.5rem;
    display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.5rem;align-items:center;
    }
    .hero-headline-sep{color:var(--gold);opacity:0.5}
    .hero-desc{
    font-size:clamp(0.9rem,1.5vw,1rem);
    color:var(--text-muted);max-width:520px;
    line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:3rem;
    font-weight:300;
    }
    .hero-btns{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1rem;align-items:center}
    .btn-primary{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
    padding:14px 32px;border-radius:100px;
    background:var(--gold);color:#0A0A0A;
    font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif;font-size:0.8rem;
    font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;
    text-decoration:none;transition:all 0.3s;
    box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(212,175,55,0.3);
    }
    .btn-primary:hover{background:var(--gold-light);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 0 50px rgba(212,175,55,0.5)}
    .btn-secondary{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
    padding:14px 32px;border-radius:100px;
    background:transparent;
    border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    color:var(--text-muted);
    font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif;font-size:0.8rem;
    font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;
    text-decoration:none;transition:all 0.3s;
    }
    .btn-secondary:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);transform:translateY(-2px)}
    .hero-floating-cards{
    position:absolute;right:5%;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;
    z-index:1;
    }
    .f-card{
    padding:16px 20px;min-width:200px;
    background:var(--glass);
    border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    border-radius:12px;
    backdrop-filter:blur(20px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
    }
    .f-card-label{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;color:var(--text-dim);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px}
    .f-card-val{font-size:0.9rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--text)}
    .f-card-val span{color:var(--gold)}
    @keyframes floatA{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0px) rotate(-1deg)}50%{transform:translateY(-12px) rotate(1deg)}}
    @keyframes floatB{0%,100%{transform:translateY(-6px) rotate(1deg)}50%{transform:translateY(6px) rotate(-1deg)}}
    @keyframes floatC{0%,100%{transform:translateY(3px) rotate(0.5deg)}50%{transform:translateY(-9px) rotate(-0.5deg)}}
    .f-card:nth-child(1){animation:floatA 6s ease-in-out infinite}
    .f-card:nth-child(2){animation:floatB 7s ease-in-out infinite}
    .f-card:nth-child(3){animation:floatC 5s ease-in-out infinite}
    .scroll-hint{
    position:absolute;bottom:40px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px;
    color:var(--text-dim);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;
    text-transform:uppercase;animation:float 3s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes float{0%,100%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(-6px)}}
    .scroll-hint-arrow{
    width:20px;height:30px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;padding-top:4px;
    }
    .scroll-hint-dot{width:3px;height:8px;background:var(--gold);border-radius:3px;animation:scrollDot 1.5s ease-in-out infinite}
    @keyframes scrollDot{0%{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}100%{transform:translateY(10px);opacity:0}}
    /* TYPE ANIMATION */
    #typed-text::after{content:'|';animation:blink 1s step-end infinite;color:var(--gold)}
    @keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0}}
    /* ====== ABOUT ====== */
    #about{background:var(--bg2)}
    .about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:center}
    .about-img-wrap{position:relative}
    .about-img-box{
    width:100%;padding-top:120%;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold-dim),var(--glass));
    border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:20px;
    position:relative;overflow:hidden;
    }
    .about-img-box::before{
    content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
    background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 30%,rgba(212,175,55,0.15),transparent 70%);
    }
    .about-avatar-placeholder{
    position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:12px;
    color:var(--text-dim);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;
    }
    .about-avatar-icon{font-size:5rem;opacity:0.4}
    .about-tag{
    position:absolute;padding:10px 18px;background:var(--glass);
    border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:100px;
    backdrop-filter:blur(12px);font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:500;
    }
    .about-tag-1{bottom:-16px;left:-16px;color:var(--gold)}
    .about-tag-2{top:-16px;right:-16px;color:var(--text)}
    .about-text p{color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:1.2rem;font-size:0.95rem}
    .about-values{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem;margin-top:2rem}
    .about-val{
    padding:16px;border-radius:12px;
    background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
    }
    .about-val-icon{font-size:1.2rem}
    /* ====== SKILLS ====== */
    #skills{background:var(--bg)}
    .skills-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2rem}
    .skill-cat{padding:2rem;border-radius:var(--radius);background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border)}
    .skill-cat-title{
    font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:600;
    margin-bottom:1.5rem;color:var(--text);
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
    }
    .skill-cat-title span{font-size:1.3rem}
    .skill-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}
    .skill-tag{
    padding:7px 14px;border-radius:100px;
    background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--text-muted);
    transition:all 0.3s;cursor:default;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;
    letter-spacing:0.05em;
    }
    .skill-tag:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:var(--gold-dim)}
    .skill-bar-item{margin-bottom:1rem}
    .skill-bar-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted)}
    .skill-bar-track{height:3px;background:var(--glass-border);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden}
    .skill-bar-fill{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),var(--gold-light));border-radius:3px;width:0;transition:width 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)}
    /* ====== PROJECTS ====== */
    #projects{background:var(--bg2)}
    .featured-project{
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:60px;align-items:start;
    padding:3rem;border-radius:24px;
    background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    margin-bottom:3rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
    }
    .featured-project::before{
    content:'';position:absolute;top:0;right:0;width:50%;height:100%;
    background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 20%,rgba(212,175,55,0.06),transparent 60%);
    pointer-events:none;
    }
    .project-eyebrow{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
    font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:0.25em;text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:1rem;
    }
    .project-title{
    font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:clamp(2.5rem,5vw,4rem);
    font-weight:700;line-height:1;margin-bottom:1rem;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--text),var(--gold-light));
    -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;
    }
    .project-desc{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:2rem}
    .project-stack{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-bottom:2rem}
    .stack-tag{
    padding:5px 12px;border-radius:100px;
    background:var(--gold-dim);border:1px solid rgba(212,175,55,0.2);
    font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:0.1em;
    }
    .project-features{list-style:none;margin-bottom:2rem}
    .project-features li{
    padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-muted);
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
    }
    .project-features li::before{content:'→';color:var(--gold);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.75rem}
    .project-links{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
    .project-visual{
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bg3),var(--bg));
    border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:16px;
    padding:2rem;min-height:360px;
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;
    }
    .pv-topbar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:1rem}
    .pv-dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%}
    .pv-dot.red{background:#FF5F57}
    .pv-dot.yellow{background:#FFBD2E}
    .pv-dot.green{background:#28C840}
    .pv-title-bar{flex:1;height:10px;background:var(--glass);border-radius:5px}
    .pv-search{height:24px;background:var(--glass);border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
    .pv-search::after{
    content:'📚 BookNest — Your Personal Library';
    position:absolute;left:10px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
    font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--text-dim);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;
    }
    .pv-content{flex:1;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px}
    .pv-book{
    border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    padding:8px;font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-dim);
    background:var(--glass);display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;
    }
    .pv-book-cover{
    height:50px;border-radius:4px;margin-bottom:4px;
    }
    .pv-stat-row{display:flex;gap:6px}
    .pv-stat{flex:1;padding:8px;background:var(--glass);border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);text-align:center}
    .pv-stat-num{font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--gold);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace}
    .pv-stat-label{font-size:0.55rem;color:var(--text-dim);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-top:2px}
    .roadmap{margin-top:1.5rem}
    .roadmap-title{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text-dim);margin-bottom:1rem}
    .roadmap-items{position:relative;padding-left:24px}
    .roadmap-items::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:7px;top:0;bottom:0;width:1px;background:var(--glass-border)}
    .roadmap-item{
    position:relative;margin-bottom:16px;
    font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);
    }
    .roadmap-item::before{
    content:'';position:absolute;left:-20px;top:6px;
    width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;
    border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:var(--bg);
    }
    .roadmap-item.done::before{background:var(--gold);border-color:var(--gold)}
    .roadmap-item .status{
    display:inline-block;margin-left:8px;
    font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6rem;
    padding:2px 8px;border-radius:100px;
    }
    .status.done{background:rgba(40,200,64,0.15);color:#28C840;border:1px solid rgba(40,200,64,0.2)}
    .status.wip{background:var(--gold-dim);color:var(--gold);border:1px solid rgba(212,175,55,0.2)}
    .status.planned{background:var(--glass);color:var(--text-dim);border:1px solid var(--glass-border)}
    /* FUTURE PROJECTS */
    .future-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:2rem}
    .future-card{
    padding:2.5rem;border-radius:var(--radius);
    background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    position:relative;overflow:hidden;
    }
    .future-card::before{
    content:'';position:absolute;top:-50%;left:-50%;width:200%;height:200%;
    background:radial-gradient(circle at 60% 40%,rgba(212,175,55,0.04),transparent 50%);
    pointer-events:none;
    }
    .coming-soon-badge{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
    padding:5px 14px;border-radius:100px;
    background:rgba(255,140,0,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,140,0,0.2);
    font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6rem;color:#FF8C00;
    letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1rem;
    }
    /* ====== ACHIEVEMENTS ====== */
    #achievements{background:var(--bg)}
    .achievements-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:1.5rem}
    .ach-card{
    padding:2rem;border-radius:var(--radius);
    background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:all 0.4s;
    }
    .ach-card:hover{border-color:rgba(212,175,55,0.3);transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.4),0 0 40px var(--gold-dim)}
    .ach-card::before{
    content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);
    opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;
    }
    .ach-card:hover::before{opacity:1}
    .ach-icon{font-size:2.5rem;margin-bottom:1rem;display:block}
    .ach-title{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:0.5rem}
    .ach-desc{font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-muted)}
    .ach-meta{
    margin-top:1.5rem;padding-top:1rem;border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;
    text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);
    }
    /* ====== EDUCATION ====== */
    #education{background:var(--bg2)}
    .timeline{position:relative;padding-left:48px;max-width:700px}
    .timeline::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:16px;top:0;bottom:0;width:1px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--gold),var(--glass-border),transparent)}
    .timeline-item{position:relative;margin-bottom:3rem}
    .timeline-item::before{
    content:'';position:absolute;left:-40px;top:8px;
    width:16px;height:16px;border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--bg);border:2px solid var(--glass-border);
    transition:all 0.3s;
    }
    .timeline-item.active::before{border-color:var(--gold);background:var(--gold);box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--gold-glow)}
    .timeline-item.future::before{border-style:dashed;border-color:var(--text-dim)}
    .timeline-date{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px}
    .timeline-title{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:6px}
    .timeline-subtitle{font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:8px}
    .timeline-desc{font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-dim)}
    /* ====== GITHUB ====== */
    #github{background:var(--bg)}
    .github-wrap{
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:3rem;align-items:start;
    }
    .github-profile{
    padding:2.5rem;border-radius:var(--radius);
    background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    }
    .github-avatar{
    width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--gold-dim);border:2px solid var(--gold);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem;
    }
    .github-name{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px}
    .github-handle{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-bottom:1.5rem}
    .github-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:1rem;margin-top:1.5rem;padding-top:1.5rem;border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border)}
    .gh-stat{text-align:center}
    .gh-stat-num{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--gold)}
    .gh-stat-label{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-dim);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-top:2px}
    .github-contrib{
    padding:2rem;border-radius:var(--radius);
    background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    margin-bottom:1rem;
    }
    .contrib-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(52,1fr);gap:2px;margin-top:1rem}
    .contrib-cell{
    aspect-ratio:1;border-radius:2px;
    background:var(--bg3);transition:background 0.3s;
    }
    .contrib-cell.lvl1{background:rgba(212,175,55,0.2)}
    .contrib-cell.lvl2{background:rgba(212,175,55,0.4)}
    .contrib-cell.lvl3{background:rgba(212,175,55,0.6)}
    .contrib-cell.lvl4{background:var(--gold)}
    .contrib-cell:hover{transform:scale(1.5);border-radius:1px}
    /* ====== BEYOND CODING ====== */
    #beyond{background:var(--bg2)}
    .beyond-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:1.2rem}
    .beyond-card{
    padding:1.8rem;border-radius:var(--radius);
    background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    transition:all 0.4s;cursor:default;
    }
    .beyond-card:hover{
    border-color:rgba(212,175,55,0.3);
    background:rgba(212,175,55,0.04);
    transform:translateY(-4px);
    }
    .beyond-icon{font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:0.8rem;display:block}
    .beyond-title{font-size:0.9rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:6px}
    .beyond-desc{font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.6}
    /* ====== CONTACT ====== */
    #contact{background:var(--bg)}
    .contact-wrap{max-width:700px;margin:0 auto;text-align:center}
    .contact-cta{
    font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
    font-size:clamp(2rem,5vw,3.5rem);font-weight:300;
    line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:1.5rem;
    }
    .contact-cta em{font-style:italic;color:var(--gold)}
    .contact-sub{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;margin-bottom:3rem}
    .contact-links{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:3rem}
    .contact-link{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
    padding:14px 28px;border-radius:100px;
    background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    color:var(--text-muted);text-decoration:none;
    font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:500;transition:all 0.3s;
    }
    .contact-link:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);transform:translateY(-2px)}
    .contact-form{
    background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    border-radius:var(--radius);padding:2.5rem;text-align:left;
    }
    .form-row{margin-bottom:1.2rem}
    .form-label{display:block;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.62rem;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text-dim);margin-bottom:8px}
    .form-input,.form-textarea{
    width:100%;padding:14px 18px;
    background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    border-radius:10px;color:var(--text);font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif;font-size:0.9rem;
    outline:none;transition:border-color 0.3s;
    }
    .form-input:focus,.form-textarea:focus{border-color:var(--gold)}
    .form-textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:120px}
    .form-submit{
    width:100%;padding:15px;border-radius:100px;
    background:var(--gold);color:#0A0A0A;
    font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif;font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:700;
    letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
    border:none;cursor:none;transition:all 0.3s;
    box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(212,175,55,0.2);
    }
    .form-submit:hover{background:var(--gold-light);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 0 50px rgba(212,175,55,0.4)}
    /* FOOTER */
    footer{
    padding:40px 5%;
    border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1rem;
    background:var(--bg2);
    }
    .footer-name{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--gold)}
    .footer-copy{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;color:var(--text-dim)}
    .footer-back{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
    font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;
    color:var(--text-dim);text-decoration:none;transition:color 0.3s;
    }
    .footer-back:hover{color:var(--gold)}
    /* DIVIDER */
    .section-divider{height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--glass-border),transparent);margin:0 5%}
    /* RESPONSIVE */
    @media(max-width:1024px){
    .hero-floating-cards{display:none}
    .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:40px}
    .skills-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
    .featured-project{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .github-wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    }
    @media(max-width:768px){
    nav{padding:0 1.2rem}
    .nav-links{display:none}
    .hamburger{display:flex}
    section{padding:80px 1.2rem}
    .skills-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .hero-name{font-size:clamp(3rem,15vw,6rem)}
    footer{padding:30px 1.2rem}
    .achievements-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    }
    @media(max-width:480px){
    .hero-btns{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start}
    .contact-links{flex-direction:column;align-items:center}
    .github-stats{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr}
    }
    /* Light mode nav */
    [data-theme="light"] nav.scrolled{border-color:rgba(0,0,0,0.08)}
    [data-theme="light"] .hero-grid-overlay{
    background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0.03) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(0,0,0,0.03) 1px,transparent 1px);
    }
    [data-theme="light"] .form-input,[data-theme="light"] .form-textarea{background:var(--bg2)}
    [data-theme="light"] .pv-book{background:rgba(0,0,0,0.04)}
    [data-theme="light"] .project-visual{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bg2),var(--bg3))}
    [data-theme="light"] #cursor{mix-blend-mode:normal;background:#000}
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <!-- SCROLL PROGRESS -->
    <div id="progress"></div>
    <!-- CUSTOM CURSOR -->
    <div id="cursor"></div>
    <div id="cursor-ring"></div>
    <!-- LOADER -->
    <div id="loader">
    <div class="loader-name">
    <span style="animation-delay:0s">H</span><span style="animation-delay:0.05s">A</span><span style="animation-delay:0.1s">R</span><span style="animation-delay:0.15s">I</span><span style="animation-delay:0.2s">S</span><span style="animation-delay:0.25s">H</span>&nbsp;<span style="animation-delay:0.35s">S</span>
    </div>
    <div class="loader-bar"><div class="loader-fill"></div></div>
    <div class="loader-sub">Initializing Portfolio</div>
    </div>
    <!-- MOBILE NAV -->
    <div class="mobile-nav" id="mobileNav">
    <a href="#home" onclick="closeMobile()">Home</a>
    <a href="#about" onclick="closeMobile()">About</a>
    <a href="#skills" onclick="closeMobile()">Skills</a>
    <a href="#projects" onclick="closeMobile()">Projects</a>
    <a href="#achievements" onclick="closeMobile()">Achievements</a>
    <a href="#education" onclick="closeMobile()">Education</a>
    <a href="#beyond" onclick="closeMobile()">Beyond Coding</a>
    <a href="#contact" onclick="closeMobile()">Contact</a>
    </div>
    <!-- NAV -->
    <nav id="navbar">
    <a href="#home" class="nav-logo">HARISH<span>.S</span></a>
    <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#home">Home</a></li>
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
    <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
    <li><a href="#achievements">Achievements</a></li>
    <li><a href="#education">Education</a></li>
    <li><a href="#beyond">Beyond</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
    </ul>
    <div class="nav-right">
    <button class="theme-toggle" id="themeToggle" aria-label="Toggle theme">🌙</button>
    <a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Hire Me</a>
    <div class="hamburger" id="hamburger" onclick="toggleMobile()">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
    </div>
    </div>
    </nav>
    <!-- ====== HERO ====== -->
    <section id="home">
    <div class="hero-bg"></div>
    <div class="hero-grid-overlay"></div>
    <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-badge">
    <span>Available for Internship & Freelance</span>
    </div>
    <h1 class="hero-name">HARISH S</h1>
    <span class="hero-handle">@HarishHAXR</span>
    <div class="hero-headline">
    <span id="typed-text"></span>
    </div>
    <p class="hero-desc">
    Passionate about building practical software solutions, exploring artificial intelligence, and creating meaningful digital experiences that solve real-world problems.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
    <a href="#projects" class="btn-primary">View Projects →</a>
    <a href="#contact" class="btn-secondary">Contact Me</a>
    <a href="https://github.com/shreeharish478-collab" target="_blank" class="btn-secondary">⚡ GitHub</a>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-floating-cards">
    <div class="f-card">
    <div class="f-card-label">Current Status</div>
    <div class="f-card-val">Diploma · <span>3rd Year</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="f-card">
    <div class="f-card-label">Specialization</div>
    <div class="f-card-val"><span>Computer Engineering</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="f-card">
    <div class="f-card-label">Open To</div>
    <div class="f-card-val">Internship & <span>Freelance</span></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="scroll-hint">
    <div class="scroll-hint-arrow"><div class="scroll-hint-dot"></div></div>
    <span>Scroll</span>
    </div>
    </section>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
    <!-- ====== ABOUT ====== -->
    <section id="about">
    <div class="about-grid">
    <div class="about-img-wrap reveal">
    <div class="about-img-box">
    <div class="about-avatar-placeholder">
    <div class="about-avatar-icon">👨‍💻</div>
    <span>Harish S</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="about-tag about-tag-1">🚀 Building the Future</div>
    <div class="about-tag about-tag-2">✨ Harish HAXR</div>
    </div>
    <div class="about-text reveal reveal-delay-2">
    <span class="section-label">// About Me</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">Crafting Code<br>with <em>Purpose</em></h2>
    <p>I'm Harish S — a Diploma Computer Engineering student with a deep passion for building software that matters. My developer identity, <strong style="color:var(--gold)">Harish HAXR</strong>, reflects my approach: methodical, creative, and always pushing boundaries.</p>
    <p>I believe in learning by building. From web applications to exploring AI systems, I approach every project as an opportunity to grow and solve real problems. My goal is to bridge imagination and execution — turning ideas into functional, beautiful software.</p>
    <p>Currently focused on web development, Python, and expanding my understanding of artificial intelligence while preparing for a Bachelor of Engineering degree.</p>
    <div class="about-values">
    <div class="about-val"><span class="about-val-icon">🎯</span> Problem Solving</div>
    <div class="about-val"><span class="about-val-icon">🤖</span> AI & ML Interest</div>
    <div class="about-val"><span class="about-val-icon">⚡</span> Fast Learner</div>
    <div class="about-val"><span class="about-val-icon">🌐</span> Web Developer</div>
    <div class="about-val"><span class="about-val-icon">💡</span> Innovation</div>
    <div class="about-val"><span class="about-val-icon">📚</span> Continuous Growth</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
    <!-- ====== SKILLS ====== -->
    <section id="skills">
    <span class="section-label reveal">// Technical Arsenal</span>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal reveal-delay-1">Skills &<br><em>Technologies</em></h2>
    <div class="skills-grid" style="margin-top:3rem">
    <div class="glass-card skill-cat reveal reveal-delay-1">
    <div class="skill-cat-title"><span>💻</span> Programming</div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:1.5rem">
    <div class="skill-bar-item"><div class="skill-bar-header"><span>PHP</span><span>75%</span></div><div class="skill-bar-track"><div class="skill-bar-fill" data-width="75"></div></div></div>
    <div class="skill-bar-item"><div class="skill-bar-header"><span>Python</span><span>70%</span></div><div class="skill-bar-track"><div class="skill-bar-fill" data-width="70"></div></div></div>
    <div class="skill-bar-item"><div class="skill-bar-header"><span>JavaScript</span><span>65%</span></div><div class="skill-bar-track"><div class="skill-bar-fill" data-width="65"></div></div></div>
    <div class="skill-bar-item"><div class="skill-bar-header"><span>HTML / CSS</span><span>85%</span></div><div class="skill-bar-track"><div class="skill-bar-fill" data-width="85"></div></div></div>
    <div class="skill-bar-item"><div class="skill-bar-header"><span>SQL</span><span>68%</span></div><div class="skill-bar-track"><div class="skill-bar-fill" data-width="68"></div></div></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="glass-card skill-cat reveal reveal-delay-2">
    <div class="skill-cat-title"><span>🛠️</span> Tools & Platforms</div>
    <div class="skill-tags">
    <span class="skill-tag">GitHub</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">VS Code</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Termux</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">MySQL</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Git</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Linux CLI</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">XAMPP</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Chrome DevTools</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="glass-card skill-cat reveal reveal-delay-3">
    <div class="skill-cat-title"><span>🧠</span> Soft Skills</div>
    <div class="skill-tags">
    <span class="skill-tag">Problem Solving</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Teaching</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Communication</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Leadership</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Creativity</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Teamwork</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Self-Learning</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Adaptability</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
    <!-- ====== PROJECTS ====== -->
    <section id="projects">
    <span class="section-label reveal">// Featured Work</span>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal reveal-delay-1">What I've<br><em>Built</em></h2>
    <!-- BOOKNEST FEATURED -->
    <div class="featured-project reveal" style="margin-top:3rem">
    <div>
    <div class="project-eyebrow">⭐ Flagship Project</div>
    <div class="project-title">BookNest</div>
    <p class="project-desc">A personal library management system designed to help readers track, organize, and discover books. BookNest combines clean UI design with practical functionality — allowing users to manage reading lists, track progress, and build their literary identity online.</p>
    <div class="project-stack">
    <span class="stack-tag">PHP</span>
    <span class="stack-tag">MySQL</span>
    <span class="stack-tag">HTML/CSS</span>
    <span class="stack-tag">JavaScript</span>
    <span class="stack-tag">Responsive Design</span>
    </div>
    <ul class="project-features">
    <li>Personal book collection tracker with reading status</li>
    <li>User authentication & profile management</li>
    <li>Book search and filtering system</li>
    <li>Reading progress & statistics dashboard</li>
    <li>Wishlist and recommendations engine</li>
    <li>Clean, mobile-first responsive interface</li>
    </ul>
    <div class="project-links">
    <a href="https://github.com/shreeharish478-collab" target="_blank" class="btn-primary">View on GitHub →</a>
    <a href="#contact" class="btn-secondary">Request Demo</a>
    </div>
    <div class="roadmap">
    <div class="roadmap-title">Project Roadmap</div>
    <div class="roadmap-items">
    <div class="roadmap-item done">Core database schema & backend <span class="status done">Done</span></div>
    <div class="roadmap-item done">User auth & session management <span class="status done">Done</span></div>
    <div class="roadmap-item done">Book CRUD operations <span class="status done">Done</span></div>
    <div class="roadmap-item">Reading stats dashboard <span class="status wip">In Progress</span></div>
    <div class="roadmap-item">Social sharing features <span class="status planned">Planned</span></div>
    <div class="roadmap-item">AI book recommendations <span class="status planned">Planned</span></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-visual">
    <div class="pv-topbar">
    <div class="pv-dot red"></div>
    <div class="pv-dot yellow"></div>
    <div class="pv-dot green"></div>
    <div class="pv-title-bar"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="pv-search"></div>
    <div class="pv-stat-row">
    <div class="pv-stat"><div class="pv-stat-num">12</div><div class="pv-stat-label">Books</div></div>
    <div class="pv-stat"><div class="pv-stat-num">4</div><div class="pv-stat-label">Reading</div></div>
    <div class="pv-stat"><div class="pv-stat-num">8</div><div class="pv-stat-label">Done</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="pv-content">
    <div class="pv-book">
    <div class="pv-book-cover" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(212,175,55,0.3),rgba(212,175,55,0.1))"></div>
    <span>Clean Code</span>
    <span style="color:var(--gold);font-size:0.55rem">📖 Reading</span>
    </div>
    <div class="pv-book">
    <div class="pv-book-cover" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(100,200,255,0.2),rgba(50,100,200,0.1))"></div>
    <span>Deep Work</span>
    <span style="color:#28C840;font-size:0.55rem">✓ Finished</span>
    </div>
    <div class="pv-book">
    <div class="pv-book-cover" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,100,100,0.2),rgba(200,50,100,0.1))"></div>
    <span>AI Basics</span>
    <span style="color:var(--text-dim);font-size:0.55rem">⏳ Wishlist</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:12px;background:var(--glass);border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border)">
    <div style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-dim);margin-bottom:6px">Reading Progress</div>
    <div style="height:4px;background:var(--bg3);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden">
    <div style="height:100%;width:67%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),var(--gold-light));border-radius:4px"></div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--gold);margin-top:4px;text-align:right">67% this month</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- FUTURE PROJECTS -->
    <span class="section-label reveal" style="display:block;margin-top:5rem;margin-bottom:1rem">// Coming Next</span>
    <h3 class="section-title reveal reveal-delay-1" style="font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3vw,2.5rem)">What I'm<br>Building <em>Next</em></h3>
    <div class="future-grid reveal" style="margin-top:2rem">
    <div class="future-card glass-card">
    <span class="coming-soon-badge">⚡ Coming Soon</span>
    <h3 style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:2rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:1rem">Mindflow AI</h3>
    <p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;line-height:1.8;max-width:600px;margin-bottom:1.5rem">An AI-powered system focused on helping people better understand stress, emotions, behavior patterns, and personal growth through intelligent insights and user-centered design. Mindflow will leverage machine learning to identify patterns in emotional data and provide personalized coping strategies.</p>
    <div class="project-stack">
    <span class="stack-tag">Python</span>
    <span class="stack-tag">AI / ML</span>
    <span class="stack-tag">NLP</span>
    <span class="stack-tag">Web App</span>
    <span class="stack-tag">Data Visualization</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
    <!-- ====== ACHIEVEMENTS ====== -->
    <section id="achievements">
    <span class="section-label reveal">// Recognition</span>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal reveal-delay-1">Achievements &<br><em>Milestones</em></h2>
    <div class="achievements-grid" style="margin-top:3rem">
    <div class="ach-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
    <span class="ach-icon">🏆</span>
    <div class="ach-title">School First Rank</div>
    <p class="ach-desc">Achieved first rank in school, demonstrating academic excellence and consistent dedication to learning.</p>
    <div class="ach-meta">Academic Excellence</div>
    </div>
    <div class="ach-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
    <span class="ach-icon">✨</span>
    <div class="ach-title">Shine 2K25</div>
    <p class="ach-desc">Recognized at Shine 2K25, a platform celebrating outstanding performance and emerging talent in technology and academics.</p>
    <div class="ach-meta">2025 · Shine Award</div>
    </div>
    <div class="ach-card reveal reveal-delay-3" style="border-style:dashed;opacity:0.7">
    <span class="ach-icon">🎯</span>
    <div class="ach-title">More Coming</div>
    <p class="ach-desc">Hackathons, certifications, competitions and internship recognitions are on the horizon as the journey continues.</p>
    <div class="ach-meta" style="color:var(--text-dim)">Future Milestones</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
    <!-- ====== EDUCATION ====== -->
    <section id="education">
    <span class="section-label reveal">// Academic Journey</span>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal reveal-delay-1">The Path<br>I've <em>Walked</em></h2>
    <div class="timeline reveal" style="margin-top:3rem">
    <div class="timeline-item active">
    <div class="timeline-date">2022 — Present</div>
    <div class="timeline-title">Diploma in Computer Engineering</div>
    <div class="timeline-subtitle">Government Polytechnic · Maharashtra, India</div>
    <p class="timeline-desc">Pursuing a 3-year diploma program with focus on programming, networking, databases, and software development. Currently in the final year.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item active">
    <div class="timeline-date">Completed · 2022</div>
    <div class="timeline-title">School Education (SSC)</div>
    <div class="timeline-subtitle">Secondary School · Maharashtra</div>
    <p class="timeline-desc">Completed 10th standard with distinction. Achieved First Rank in school — a defining moment that set the foundation for academic excellence.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item active">
    <div class="timeline-date">2024 — Present</div>
    <div class="timeline-title">Industrial Internship</div>
    <div class="timeline-subtitle">Practical Industry Exposure</div>
    <p class="timeline-desc">Gaining real-world experience through industrial internship, bridging academic knowledge with professional practice in software development.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item future">
    <div class="timeline-date" style="color:var(--text-dim)">2025 — Future</div>
    <div class="timeline-title" style="color:var(--text-muted)">Bachelor of Engineering (BE)</div>
    <div class="timeline-subtitle" style="color:var(--text-dim)">Computer Engineering</div>
    <p class="timeline-desc" style="color:var(--text-dim)">The next step — pursuing a full degree in Computer Engineering to deepen expertise in AI, software systems, and engineering principles.</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
    View remainder of file in raw view

    Footer

    © 2026 GitHub, Inc.
